package bundles all Router facets and provides deterministic deployment via the DiamondPackageCallBackFactory. The Router Diamond provides: - Single token swaps (IRouter) - Add/remove liquidity (IRouter) - Pool initialization (IRouter) - Batch swaps (IBatchRouter) - Buffer operations (IBufferRouter) - Composite liquidity for ERC4626 and nested pools (ICompositeLiquidityRouter) Usage: 1. Deploy this package with all facet references 2. Call deployRouter() to create router instances 3. params.permit2: The Permit2 contract (address(0) for prepaid routers)

initAccount(bytes).details: Called via delegatecall from the proxy during deployment.

postDeploy(address).details: Router doesn't need any post-deployment registration.

calcSalt(bytes).notice: Calculates the deterministic salt for deployment.

deployRouter(address,address,address,str.notice: Deploy a new Router Diamond instance.

facetCuts().notice: Returns the facet cuts for diamond construction.

facetInterfaces().notice: Returns all interface IDs supported by deployed routers.

initAccount(bytes).notice: Initializes the router storage on the deployed proxy.

updatePkg(address,bytes).notice: Updates an existing deployment (not supported for Router).
